features.name: Announcement banner at top (dismissible)
Featured Project spotlight hero card
Metrics section with personality (icons, labels, count-up)
How it works section polished
Dark footer with AIPS links (Instagram, email, guidelines)
Overall home page feels editorial and professional
Two-column layout (projects left, activity right)
Activity feed with timestamps
Activity feed shows new player card applications
Activity feed shows status changes (approved/revision)
Project cards show status badge + score + applicant count
Quick actions on project cards (view, edit, applicants)
Dashboard auto-loads on login (no email lookup)
Join This Team button works
Filter pills visible (All/All Roles not white on white)
Confetti fires on submit and approve
Card flip reveal after player card submission
Spotlight hover effect on cards
Responsive layout (mobile + tablet)
No JS console errors on any page
